key_facts: Özgür Özel became CHP chairman in November 2023, defeating Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu at party congress
CHP won major victories in March 2024 local elections including Istanbul and Ankara
Internal CHP tensions have centered on factional disputes, the İmamoğlu factor, and strategic direction vis-à-vis the AKP government
Turkey has a recurring pattern of opposition party splits (İYİ Party in 2017 being a recent example)
As of last confirmed information, no formal new party had been launched by Özel or a major CHP breakaway faction
CRITICAL LIMITATION: No live web sources could be accessed for June 2026 developments — all findings reflect background knowledge only
